title: Svetasvatara Upanishad: The One God Within
description: The earliest Upanishad to identify Brahman with a personal God — Rudra-Shiva — who dwells within all beings.
introduction: The earliest Upanishad to identify Brahman with a personal God — Rudra-Shiva — who dwells within all beings.

translation.text: He who is the one God, hidden in all beings, all-pervading, the inner Self of all beings — him the wise perceive.
